== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Shinmu Tennō]] 76th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:585 BC|585 BC]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Shinmu Tennō]], the first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (born [[:en:585 BC|585 BC]] or another traditional date). * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:618|618]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Yang of Sui|Yang Emperor]], the 2nd emperor of the [[:en:Sui dynasty|Sui Dynasty]] (born [[:en:569|569]]). * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1368|1368]] [[:en:March 29|March 29]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Murakami|Go-Murakami Tennō]], the 97th emperor (born [[:en:1328|1328]]). * In Tenshō 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:April 3|April 3]]) – [[:en:Takeda Katsuyori|Takeda Katsuyori]], a samurai and son of [[:en:Takeda Shingen|Takeda Shingen]] (born [[:en:1546|1546]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|10|3|12|2|11|4|3|0311|qq=}}

== Events == * (【[318]】 _月_日) – The governor of the southern Yangtze region, {{ill|Sima Mo|ja|司馬寞|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sima Mo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, ascended to the throne proclaiming himself 【元帝】, and the {{ill|Eastern Jin|ja|東晋|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eastern Jin|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Eastern Jin dynasty|WD=Q306928}} was established. * [[:en:Eiryaku|Eireki]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1160|1160]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – Following defeat in the [[:en:Heiji rebellion|Heiji Rebellion]], [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] was exiled to {{ill|Izu (disambiguation)|ja|伊豆|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16766555|lt=Izu|1=Izu (disambiguation)}}. * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1192|1192]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – In the outskirts of the Southern Song capital, the [[:en:Marco Polo Bridge|Lugou Bridge]] (also known as Marco Polo Bridge) was constructed. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:April 3|April 3]]) – After the combined forces of [[Oda Nobunaga]] and {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|家康|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Ieyasu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川家康|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q171977}} defeated him, [[:en:Takeda Katsuyori|Takeda Katsuyori]] committed suicide, leading to the downfall of the [[:en:Takeda clan|Takeda clan]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1608|1608]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – Having resigned as Commander-in-Chief, [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] relocated to [[:en:Sunpu Castle|Sunpu Castle]].
== Births == * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Nariaki|Tokugawa Saira]], the 9th head of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] and father of [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] (died [[:en:1860|1860]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – [[:en:Hashimoto Sanai|Hashimoto Sanao]], a samurai of the [[:en:Fukui Domain|Fukui Domain]] (died [[:en:1859|1859]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Shinmu Tennō]] 76th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:585 BC|585 BC]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Shinmu Tennō]], the first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (born [[:en:585 BC|585 BC]] or another traditional date). * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:618|618]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Yang of Sui|Yang Emperor]], the 2nd emperor of the [[:en:Sui dynasty|Sui Dynasty]] (born [[:en:569|569]]). * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1368|1368]] [[:en:March 29|March 29]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Murakami|Go-Murakami Tennō]], the 97th emperor (born [[:en:1328|1328]]). * In Tenshō 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:April 3|April 3]]) – [[:en:Takeda Katsuyori|Takeda Katsuyori]], a samurai and son of [[:en:Takeda Shingen|Takeda Shingen]] (born [[:en:1546|1546]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|10|3|12|2|11|4|3|0311|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

== Events == * (【[318]】 _月_日) – The governor of the southern Yangtze region, {{ill|Sima Mo|ja|司馬寞|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sima Mo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, ascended to the throne proclaiming himself 【元帝】, and the {{ill|Eastern Jin|ja|東晋|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eastern Jin|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Eastern Jin dynasty|WD=Q306928}} was established. * [[:en:Eiryaku|Eireki]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1160|1160]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – Following defeat in the [[:en:Heiji rebellion|Heiji Rebellion]], [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] was exiled to {{ill|Izu (disambiguation)|ja|伊豆|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16766555|lt=Izu|1=Izu (disambiguation)}}. * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1192|1192]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – In the outskirts of the Southern Song capital, the [[:en:Marco Polo Bridge|Lugou Bridge]] (also known as Marco Polo Bridge) was constructed. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:April 3|April 3]]) – After the combined forces of [[Oda Nobunaga]] and {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|家康|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Ieyasu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川家康|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q171977}} defeated him, [[:en:Takeda Katsuyori|Takeda Katsuyori]] committed suicide, leading to the downfall of the [[:en:Takeda clan|Takeda clan]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1608|1608]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – Having resigned as Commander-in-Chief, [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] relocated to [[:en:Sunpu Castle|Sunpu Castle]].
== Births == * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Nariaki|Tokugawa Saira]], the 9th head of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] and father of [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] (died [[:en:1860|1860]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – [[:en:Hashimoto Sanai|Hashimoto Sanao]], a samurai of the [[:en:Fukui Domain|Fukui Domain]] (died [[:en:1859|1859]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Shinmu Tennō]] 76th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:585 BC|585 BC]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Shinmu Tennō]], the first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (born [[:en:585 BC|585 BC]] or another traditional date). * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:618|618]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Yang of Sui|Yang Emperor]], the 2nd emperor of the [[:en:Sui dynasty|Sui Dynasty]] (born [[:en:569|569]]). * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1368|1368]] [[:en:March 29|March 29]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Murakami|Go-Murakami Tennō]], the 97th emperor (born [[:en:1328|1328]]). * In Tenshō 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:April 3|April 3]]) – [[:en:Takeda Katsuyori|Takeda Katsuyori]], a samurai and son of [[:en:Takeda Shingen|Takeda Shingen]] (born [[:en:1546|1546]]).

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * (【[318]】 _月_日) – The governor of the southern Yangtze region, {{ill|Sima Mo|ja|司馬寞|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sima Mo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, ascended to the throne proclaiming himself 【元帝】, and the {{ill|Eastern Jin|ja|東晋|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eastern Jin|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Eastern Jin dynasty|WD=Q306928}} was established. * [[:en:Eiryaku|Eireki]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1160|1160]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – Following defeat in the [[:en:Heiji rebellion|Heiji Rebellion]], [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] was exiled to {{ill|Izu (disambiguation)|ja|伊豆|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16766555|lt=Izu|1=Izu (disambiguation)}}. * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1192|1192]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – In the outskirts of the Southern Song capital, the [[:en:Marco Polo Bridge|Lugou Bridge]] (also known as Marco Polo Bridge) was constructed. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:April 3|April 3]]) – After the combined forces of [[Oda Nobunaga]] and {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|家康|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Ieyasu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川家康|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q171977}} defeated him, [[:en:Takeda Katsuyori|Takeda Katsuyori]] committed suicide, leading to the downfall of the [[:en:Takeda clan|Takeda clan]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1608|1608]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – Having resigned as Commander-in-Chief, [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] relocated to [[:en:Sunpu Castle|Sunpu Castle]].
== Births == * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Nariaki|Tokugawa Saira]], the 9th head of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] and father of [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] (died [[:en:1860|1860]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – [[:en:Hashimoto Sanai|Hashimoto Sanao]], a samurai of the [[:en:Fukui Domain|Fukui Domain]] (died [[:en:1859|1859]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Shinmu Tennō]] 76th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:585 BC|585 BC]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Shinmu Tennō]], the first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (born [[:en:585 BC|585 BC]] or another traditional date). * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:618|618]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Yang of Sui|Yang Emperor]], the 2nd emperor of the [[:en:Sui dynasty|Sui Dynasty]] (born [[:en:569|569]]). * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1368|1368]] [[:en:March 29|March 29]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Murakami|Go-Murakami Tennō]], the 97th emperor (born [[:en:1328|1328]]). * In Tenshō 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:April 3|April 3]]) – [[:en:Takeda Katsuyori|Takeda Katsuyori]], a samurai and son of [[:en:Takeda Shingen|Takeda Shingen]] (born [[:en:1546|1546]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|10|3|12|2|11|4|3|0311|qq=}}

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * (【[318]】 _月_日) – The governor of the southern Yangtze region, {{ill|Sima Mo|ja|司馬寞|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sima Mo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, ascended to the throne proclaiming himself 【元帝】, and the {{ill|Eastern Jin|ja|東晋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eastern Jin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Eastern Jin dynasty|WD=Q306928}} was established. * [[:en:Eiryaku|Eireki]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1160|1160]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – Following defeat in the [[:en:Heiji rebellion|Heiji Rebellion]], [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] was exiled to {{ill|Izu (disambiguation)|ja|伊豆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16766555|lt=Izu|1=Izu (disambiguation)}}. * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1192|1192]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – In the outskirts of the Southern Song capital, the [[:en:Marco Polo Bridge|Lugou Bridge]] (also known as Marco Polo Bridge) was constructed. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:April 3|April 3]]) – After the combined forces of [[Oda Nobunaga]] and {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|家康|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川家康|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q171977}} defeated him, [[:en:Takeda Katsuyori|Takeda Katsuyori]] committed suicide, leading to the downfall of the [[:en:Takeda clan|Takeda clan]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1608|1608]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – Having resigned as Commander-in-Chief, [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] relocated to [[:en:Sunpu Castle|Sunpu Castle]].
== Births == * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Nariaki|Tokugawa Saira]], the 9th head of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] and father of [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] (died [[:en:1860|1860]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – [[:en:Hashimoto Sanai|Hashimoto Sanao]], a samurai of the [[:en:Fukui Domain|Fukui Domain]] (died [[:en:1859|1859]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Shinmu Tennō]] 76th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:585 BC|585 BC]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Shinmu Tennō]], the first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (born [[:en:585 BC|585 BC]] or another traditional date). * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:618|618]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Yang of Sui|Yang Emperor]], the 2nd emperor of the [[:en:Sui dynasty|Sui Dynasty]] (born [[:en:569|569]]). * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1368|1368]] [[:en:March 29|March 29]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Murakami|Go-Murakami Tennō]], the 97th emperor (born [[:en:1328|1328]]). * In Tenshō 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:April 3|April 3]]) – [[:en:Takeda Katsuyori|Takeda Katsuyori]], a samurai and son of [[:en:Takeda Shingen|Takeda Shingen]] (born [[:en:1546|1546]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|10|3|12|2|11|4|3|0311|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 11''' is the 11th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * (【[318]】 _月_日) – The governor of the southern Yangtze region, {{ill|Sima Mo|ja|司馬寞|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sima Mo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, ascended to the throne proclaiming himself 【元帝】, and the {{ill|Eastern Jin|ja|東晋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eastern Jin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Eastern Jin dynasty|WD=Q306928}} was established. * [[:en:Eiryaku|Eireki]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1160|1160]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – Following defeat in the [[:en:Heiji rebellion|Heiji Rebellion]], [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] was exiled to {{ill|Izu (disambiguation)|ja|伊豆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16766555|lt=Izu|1=Izu (disambiguation)}}. * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1192|1192]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – In the outskirts of the Southern Song capital, the [[:en:Marco Polo Bridge|Lugou Bridge]] (also known as Marco Polo Bridge) was constructed. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:April 3|April 3]]) – After the combined forces of [[Oda Nobunaga]] and {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|家康|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川家康|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q171977}} defeated him, [[:en:Takeda Katsuyori|Takeda Katsuyori]] committed suicide, leading to the downfall of the [[:en:Takeda clan|Takeda clan]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1608|1608]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – Having resigned as Commander-in-Chief, [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] relocated to [[:en:Sunpu Castle|Sunpu Castle]].
== Births == * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Nariaki|Tokugawa Saira]], the 9th head of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] and father of [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] (died [[:en:1860|1860]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – [[:en:Hashimoto Sanai|Hashimoto Sanao]], a samurai of the [[:en:Fukui Domain|Fukui Domain]] (died [[:en:1859|1859]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Shinmu Tennō]] 76th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:585 BC|585 BC]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Shinmu Tennō]], the first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (born [[:en:585 BC|585 BC]] or another traditional date). * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:618|618]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Yang of Sui|Yang Emperor]], the 2nd emperor of the [[:en:Sui dynasty|Sui Dynasty]] (born [[:en:569|569]]). * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1368|1368]] [[:en:March 29|March 29]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Murakami|Go-Murakami Tennō]], the 97th emperor (born [[:en:1328|1328]]). * In Tenshō 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:April 3|April 3]]) – [[:en:Takeda Katsuyori|Takeda Katsuyori]], a samurai and son of [[:en:Takeda Shingen|Takeda Shingen]] (born [[:en:1546|1546]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|10|3|12|2|11|4|3|0311|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

== Events == * (【[318]】 _月_日) – The governor of the southern Yangtze region, {{ill|Sima Mo|ja|司馬寞|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sima Mo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, ascended to the throne proclaiming himself 【元帝】, and the {{ill|Eastern Jin|ja|東晋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eastern Jin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Eastern Jin dynasty|WD=Q306928}} was established. * [[:en:Eiryaku|Eireki]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1160|1160]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – Following defeat in the [[:en:Heiji rebellion|Heiji Rebellion]], [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] was exiled to {{ill|Izu (disambiguation)|ja|伊豆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16766555|lt=Izu|1=Izu (disambiguation)}}. * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1192|1192]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – In the outskirts of the Southern Song capital, the [[:en:Marco Polo Bridge|Lugou Bridge]] (also known as Marco Polo Bridge) was constructed. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:April 3|April 3]]) – After the combined forces of [[Oda Nobunaga]] and {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|家康|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川家康|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q171977}} defeated him, [[:en:Takeda Katsuyori|Takeda Katsuyori]] committed suicide, leading to the downfall of the [[:en:Takeda clan|Takeda clan]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1608|1608]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – Having resigned as Commander-in-Chief, [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] relocated to [[:en:Sunpu Castle|Sunpu Castle]].
== Births == * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Nariaki|Tokugawa Saira]], the 9th head of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] and father of [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] (died [[:en:1860|1860]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – [[:en:Hashimoto Sanai|Hashimoto Sanao]], a samurai of the [[:en:Fukui Domain|Fukui Domain]] (died [[:en:1859|1859]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Shinmu Tennō]] 76th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:585 BC|585 BC]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Shinmu Tennō]], the first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (born [[:en:585 BC|585 BC]] or another traditional date). * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:618|618]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Yang of Sui|Yang Emperor]], the 2nd emperor of the [[:en:Sui dynasty|Sui Dynasty]] (born [[:en:569|569]]). * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1368|1368]] [[:en:March 29|March 29]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Murakami|Go-Murakami Tennō]], the 97th emperor (born [[:en:1328|1328]]). * In Tenshō 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:April 3|April 3]]) – [[:en:Takeda Katsuyori|Takeda Katsuyori]], a samurai and son of [[:en:Takeda Shingen|Takeda Shingen]] (born [[:en:1546|1546]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|10|3|12|2|11|4|3|0311|qq=}}

== Events == * (【[318]】 _月_日) – The governor of the southern Yangtze region, {{ill|Sima Mo|ja|司馬寞|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sima Mo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, ascended to the throne proclaiming himself 【元帝】, and the {{ill|Eastern Jin|ja|東晋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eastern Jin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Eastern Jin dynasty|WD=Q306928}} was established. * [[:en:Eiryaku|Eireki]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1160|1160]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – Following defeat in the [[:en:Heiji rebellion|Heiji Rebellion]], [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] was exiled to {{ill|Izu (disambiguation)|ja|伊豆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16766555|lt=Izu|1=Izu (disambiguation)}}. * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1192|1192]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – In the outskirts of the Southern Song capital, the [[:en:Marco Polo Bridge|Lugou Bridge]] (also known as Marco Polo Bridge) was constructed. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:April 3|April 3]]) – After the combined forces of [[Oda Nobunaga]] and {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|家康|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川家康|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q171977}} defeated him, [[:en:Takeda Katsuyori|Takeda Katsuyori]] committed suicide, leading to the downfall of the [[:en:Takeda clan|Takeda clan]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1608|1608]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – Having resigned as Commander-in-Chief, [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] relocated to [[:en:Sunpu Castle|Sunpu Castle]].
== Births == * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Nariaki|Tokugawa Saira]], the 9th head of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] and father of [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] (died [[:en:1860|1860]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – [[:en:Hashimoto Sanai|Hashimoto Sanao]], a samurai of the [[:en:Fukui Domain|Fukui Domain]] (died [[:en:1859|1859]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Shinmu Tennō]] 76th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:585 BC|585 BC]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Shinmu Tennō]], the first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (born [[:en:585 BC|585 BC]] or another traditional date). * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:618|618]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Yang of Sui|Yang Emperor]], the 2nd emperor of the [[:en:Sui dynasty|Sui Dynasty]] (born [[:en:569|569]]). * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1368|1368]] [[:en:March 29|March 29]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Murakami|Go-Murakami Tennō]], the 97th emperor (born [[:en:1328|1328]]). * In Tenshō 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:April 3|April 3]]) – [[:en:Takeda Katsuyori|Takeda Katsuyori]], a samurai and son of [[:en:Takeda Shingen|Takeda Shingen]] (born [[:en:1546|1546]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|10|3|12|2|11|4|3|0311|qq=}}

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 11''' is the 11th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * (【[318]】 _月_日) – The governor of the southern Yangtze region, {{ill|Sima Mo|ja|司馬寞|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sima Mo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, ascended to the throne proclaiming himself 【元帝】, and the {{ill|Eastern Jin|ja|東晋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eastern Jin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Eastern Jin dynasty|WD=Q306928}} was established. * [[:en:Eiryaku|Eireki]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1160|1160]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – Following defeat in the [[:en:Heiji rebellion|Heiji Rebellion]], [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] was exiled to {{ill|Izu (disambiguation)|ja|伊豆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16766555|lt=Izu|1=Izu (disambiguation)}}. * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1192|1192]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – In the outskirts of the Southern Song capital, the [[:en:Marco Polo Bridge|Lugou Bridge]] (also known as Marco Polo Bridge) was constructed. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:April 3|April 3]]) – After the combined forces of [[Oda Nobunaga]] and {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|家康|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川家康|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q171977}} defeated him, [[:en:Takeda Katsuyori|Takeda Katsuyori]] committed suicide, leading to the downfall of the [[:en:Takeda clan|Takeda clan]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1608|1608]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – Having resigned as Commander-in-Chief, [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] relocated to [[:en:Sunpu Castle|Sunpu Castle]].
== Births == * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Nariaki|Tokugawa Saira]], the 9th head of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] and father of [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] (died [[:en:1860|1860]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – [[:en:Hashimoto Sanai|Hashimoto Sanao]], a samurai of the [[:en:Fukui Domain|Fukui Domain]] (died [[:en:1859|1859]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Shinmu Tennō]] 76th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:585 BC|585 BC]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Shinmu Tennō]], the first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (born [[:en:585 BC|585 BC]] or another traditional date). * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:618|618]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Yang of Sui|Yang Emperor]], the 2nd emperor of the [[:en:Sui dynasty|Sui Dynasty]] (born [[:en:569|569]]). * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1368|1368]] [[:en:March 29|March 29]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Murakami|Go-Murakami Tennō]], the 97th emperor (born [[:en:1328|1328]]). * In Tenshō 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:April 3|April 3]]) – [[:en:Takeda Katsuyori|Takeda Katsuyori]], a samurai and son of [[:en:Takeda Shingen|Takeda Shingen]] (born [[:en:1546|1546]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|10|3|12|2|11|4|3|0311|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 11''' is the 11th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * (【[318]】 _月_日) – The governor of the southern Yangtze region, {{ill|Sima Mo|ja|司馬寞|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sima Mo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, ascended to the throne proclaiming himself 【元帝】, and the {{ill|Eastern Jin|ja|東晋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eastern Jin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Eastern Jin dynasty|WD=Q306928}} was established. * [[:en:Eiryaku|Eireki]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1160|1160]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – Following defeat in the [[:en:Heiji rebellion|Heiji Rebellion]], [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] was exiled to {{ill|Izu (disambiguation)|ja|伊豆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16766555|lt=Izu|1=Izu (disambiguation)}}. * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1192|1192]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – In the outskirts of the Southern Song capital, the [[:en:Marco Polo Bridge|Lugou Bridge]] (also known as Marco Polo Bridge) was constructed. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:April 3|April 3]]) – After the combined forces of [[Oda Nobunaga]] and {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|家康|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川家康|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q171977}} defeated him, [[:en:Takeda Katsuyori|Takeda Katsuyori]] committed suicide, leading to the downfall of the [[:en:Takeda clan|Takeda clan]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1608|1608]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – Having resigned as Commander-in-Chief, [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] relocated to [[:en:Sunpu Castle|Sunpu Castle]].
== Births == * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Nariaki|Tokugawa Saira]], the 9th head of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] and father of [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] (died [[:en:1860|1860]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – [[:en:Hashimoto Sanai|Hashimoto Sanao]], a samurai of the [[:en:Fukui Domain|Fukui Domain]] (died [[:en:1859|1859]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Shinmu Tennō]] 76th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:585 BC|585 BC]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Shinmu Tennō]], the first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (born [[:en:585 BC|585 BC]] or another traditional date). * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:618|618]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Yang of Sui|Yang Emperor]], the 2nd emperor of the [[:en:Sui dynasty|Sui Dynasty]] (born [[:en:569|569]]). * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1368|1368]] [[:en:March 29|March 29]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Murakami|Go-Murakami Tennō]], the 97th emperor (born [[:en:1328|1328]]). * In Tenshō 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:April 3|April 3]]) – [[:en:Takeda Katsuyori|Takeda Katsuyori]], a samurai and son of [[:en:Takeda Shingen|Takeda Shingen]] (born [[:en:1546|1546]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月十一]][[zh:三月十一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月十一]][[zh:三月十一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十一]][[zh:三月十一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839273]] Wikidata name: 11th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:59, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 11|qq=March 11}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 11''' is the 11th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * (【[318]】 _月_日) – The governor of the southern Yangtze region, {{ill|Sima Mo|ja|司馬寞|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sima Mo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, ascended to the throne proclaiming himself 【元帝】, and the {{ill|Eastern Jin|ja|東晋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eastern Jin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Eastern Jin dynasty|WD=Q306928}} was established. * [[:en:Eiryaku|Eireki]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1160|1160]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – Following defeat in the [[:en:Heiji rebellion|Heiji Rebellion]], [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] was exiled to {{ill|Izu (disambiguation)|ja|伊豆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16766555|lt=Izu|1=Izu (disambiguation)}}. * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1192|1192]] [[:en:April 24|April 24]]) – In the outskirts of the Southern Song capital, the [[:en:Marco Polo Bridge|Lugou Bridge]] (also known as Marco Polo Bridge) was constructed. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:April 3|April 3]]) – After the combined forces of [[Oda Nobunaga]] and {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|家康|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川家康|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q171977}} defeated him, [[:en:Takeda Katsuyori|Takeda Katsuyori]] committed suicide, leading to the downfall of the [[:en:Takeda clan|Takeda clan]]. * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1608|1608]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – Having resigned as Commander-in-Chief, [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] relocated to [[:en:Sunpu Castle|Sunpu Castle]].
== Births == * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1800|1800]] [[:en:April 4|April 4]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Nariaki|Tokugawa Saira]], the 9th head of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] and father of [[:en:Tokugawa Yoshinobu|Tokugawa Yoshinobu]] (died [[:en:1860|1860]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1834|1834]] [[:en:April 19|April 19]]) – [[:en:Hashimoto Sanai|Hashimoto Sanao]], a samurai of the [[:en:Fukui Domain|Fukui Domain]] (died [[:en:1859|1859]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Shinmu Tennō]] 76th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:585 BC|585 BC]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Shinmu Tennō]], the first [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor of Japan]] (born [[:en:585 BC|585 BC]] or another traditional date). * ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:618|618]] [[:en:April 11|April 11]]) – [[:en:Emperor Yang of Sui|Yang Emperor]], the 2nd emperor of the [[:en:Sui dynasty|Sui Dynasty]] (born [[:en:569|569]]). * [[:en:Ōan|Ōan era]] 1st year/[[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 23rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1368|1368]] [[:en:March 29|March 29]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Murakami|Go-Murakami Tennō]], the 97th emperor (born [[:en:1328|1328]]). * In Tenshō 10th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1582|1582]] [[:en:April 3|April 3]]) – [[:en:Takeda Katsuyori|Takeda Katsuyori]], a samurai and son of [[:en:Takeda Shingen|Takeda Shingen]] (born [[:en:1546|1546]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|10|3|12|2|11|4|3|0311|qq=}}

Ieyasu}} relocated to {{ill|Sunpu Castle|en|Sunpu Castle|WD=Q1038629|lt=Sunpu Castle}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十一]][[zh:三月十一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十一]][[zh:三月十一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十一]][[zh:三月十一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839273]] Wikidata name: 11th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:59, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 11|qq=March 11}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 11''' is the 11th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * (【[318]】 _月_日) – The governor of the southern Yangtze region, {{ill|Sima Mo|ja|司馬寞|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sima Mo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, ascended to the throne proclaiming himself 【元帝】, and the {{ill|Eastern Jin|ja|東晋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eastern Jin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Eastern Jin dynasty|WD=Q306928}} was established. * {{ill|Eiryaku|en|Eiryaku|WD=Q1193895|lt=Eireki}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1160|en|1160|WD=Q19662|lt=1160}} {{ill|April 19|en|April 19|WD=Q2523|lt=April 19}}) – Following defeat in the {{ill|Heiji rebellion|en|Heiji rebellion|WD=Q944859|lt=Heiji Rebellion}}, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|WD=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} was exiled to {{ill|Izu (disambiguation)|ja|伊豆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16766555|lt=Izu|1=Izu (disambiguation)}}. * ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1192|en|1192|WD=Q19739|lt=1192}} {{ill|April 24|en|April 24|WD=Q2529|lt=April 24}}) – In the outskirts of the Southern Song capital, the {{ill|Marco Polo Bridge|en|Marco Polo Bridge|WD=Q1060121|lt=Lugou Bridge}} (also known as Marco Polo Bridge) was constructed. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1582|en|1582|WD=Q6719|lt=1582}} {{ill|April 3|en|April 3|WD=Q2509|lt=April 3}}) – After the combined forces of [[Oda Nobunaga]] and {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|家康|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川家康|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q171977}} defeated him, {{ill|Takeda Katsuyori|en|Takeda Katsuyori|WD=Q662482|lt=Takeda Katsuyori}} committed suicide, leading to the downfall of the {{ill|Takeda clan|en|Takeda clan|WD=Q1210114|lt=Takeda clan}}. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1608|en|1608|WD=Q6758|lt=1608}} {{ill|April 25|en|April 25|WD=Q2531|lt=April 25}}) – Having resigned as Commander-in-Chief, {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|WD=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} relocated to {{ill|Sunpu Castle|en|Sunpu Castle|WD=Q1038629|lt=Sunpu Castle}}.

== Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|WD=Q200188|lt=Shinmu Tennō}} 76th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|585 BC|en|585 BC|WD=Q1059158|lt=585 BC}} {{ill|April 9|en|April 9|WD=Q2504|lt=April 9}}) – {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|WD=Q200188|lt=Shinmu Tennō}}, the first {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan}} (born {{ill|585 BC|en|585 BC|WD=Q1059158|lt=585 BC}} or another traditional date). * ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|618|en|618|WD=Q31035|lt=618}} {{ill|April 11|en|April 11|WD=Q2501|lt=April 11}}) – {{ill|Emperor Yang of Sui|en|Emperor Yang of Sui|WD=Q7419|lt=Yang Emperor}}, the 2nd emperor of the {{ill|Sui dynasty|en|Sui dynasty|WD=Q7405|lt=Sui Dynasty}} (born {{ill|569|en|569|WD=Q33409|lt=569}}). * {{ill|Ōan|en|Ōan|WD=Q1146245|lt=Ōan era}} 1st year/{{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|WD=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei}} 23rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1368|en|1368|WD=Q6207|lt=1368}} {{ill|March 29|en|March 29|WD=Q2459|lt=March 29}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Murakami|en|Emperor Go-Murakami|WD=Q440447|lt=Go-Murakami Tennō}}, the 97th emperor (born {{ill|1328|en|1328|WD=Q5802|lt=1328}}). * In Tenshō 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1582|en|1582|WD=Q6719|lt=1582}} {{ill|April 3|en|April 3|WD=Q2509|lt=April 3}}) – {{ill|Takeda Katsuyori|en|Takeda Katsuyori|WD=Q662482|lt=Takeda Katsuyori}}, a samurai and son of {{ill|Takeda Shingen|en|Takeda Shingen|WD=Q276404|lt=Takeda Shingen}} (born {{ill|1546|en|1546|WD=Q6533|lt=1546}}).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十一]][[zh:三月十一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十一]][[zh:三月十一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十一]][[zh:三月十一]]
{{Not to be confused with|March 11|qq=March 11}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 11''' is the 11th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * (【[318]】 _月_日) – The governor of the southern Yangtze region, {{ill|Sima Mo|ja|司馬寞|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sima Mo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, ascended to the throne proclaiming himself 【元帝】, and the {{ill|Eastern Jin|ja|東晋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eastern Jin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Eastern Jin dynasty|WD=Q306928}} was established. * {{ill|Eiryaku|en|Eiryaku|WD=Q1193895|lt=Eireki}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1160|en|1160|WD=Q19662|lt=1160}} {{ill|April 19|en|April 19|WD=Q2523|lt=April 19}}) – Following defeat in the {{ill|Heiji rebellion|en|Heiji rebellion|WD=Q944859|lt=Heiji Rebellion}}, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|WD=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} was exiled to {{ill|Izu (disambiguation)|ja|伊豆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16766555|lt=Izu|1=Izu (disambiguation)}}. * ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1192|en|1192|WD=Q19739|lt=1192}} {{ill|April 24|en|April 24|WD=Q2529|lt=April 24}}) – In the outskirts of the Southern Song capital, the {{ill|Marco Polo Bridge|en|Marco Polo Bridge|WD=Q1060121|lt=Lugou Bridge}} (also known as Marco Polo Bridge) was constructed. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1582|en|1582|WD=Q6719|lt=1582}} {{ill|April 3|en|April 3|WD=Q2509|lt=April 3}}) – After the combined forces of [[Oda Nobunaga]] and {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|家康|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川家康|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q171977}} defeated him, {{ill|Takeda Katsuyori|en|Takeda Katsuyori|WD=Q662482|lt=Takeda Katsuyori}} committed suicide, leading to the downfall of the {{ill|Takeda clan|en|Takeda clan|WD=Q1210114|lt=Takeda clan}}. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1608|en|1608|WD=Q6758|lt=1608}} {{ill|April 25|en|April 25|WD=Q2531|lt=April 25}}) – Having resigned as Commander-in-Chief, {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|WD=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} relocated to {{ill|Sunpu Castle|en|Sunpu Castle|WD=Q1038629|lt=Sunpu Castle}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|WD=Q1195131|lt=Kansei}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1800|en|1800|WD=Q6875|lt=1800}} {{ill|April 4|en|April 4|WD=Q2508|lt=April 4}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Nariaki|en|Tokugawa Nariaki|WD=Q1323770|lt=Tokugawa Saira}}, the 9th head of the {{ill|Mito Domain|en|Mito Domain|WD=Q1146904|lt=Mito Domain}} and father of {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|en|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|WD=Q287657|lt=Tokugawa Yoshinobu}} (died {{ill|1860|en|1860|WD=Q7691|lt=1860}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1834|en|1834|WD=Q7591|lt=1834}} {{ill|April 19|en|April 19|WD=Q2523|lt=April 19}}) – {{ill|Hashimoto Sanai|en|Hashimoto Sanai|WD=Q1036286|lt=Hashimoto Sanao}}, a samurai of the {{ill|Fukui Domain|en|Fukui Domain|WD=Q903537|lt=Fukui Domain}} (died {{ill|1859|en|1859|WD=Q7687|lt=1859}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|WD=Q200188|lt=Shinmu Tennō}} 76th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|585 BC|en|585 BC|WD=Q1059158|lt=585 BC}} {{ill|April 9|en|April 9|WD=Q2504|lt=April 9}}) – {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|WD=Q200188|lt=Shinmu Tennō}}, the first {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan}} (born {{ill|585 BC|en|585 BC|WD=Q1059158|lt=585 BC}} or another traditional date). * ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|618|en|618|WD=Q31035|lt=618}} {{ill|April 11|en|April 11|WD=Q2501|lt=April 11}}) – {{ill|Emperor Yang of Sui|en|Emperor Yang of Sui|WD=Q7419|lt=Yang Emperor}}, the 2nd emperor of the {{ill|Sui dynasty|en|Sui dynasty|WD=Q7405|lt=Sui Dynasty}} (born {{ill|569|en|569|WD=Q33409|lt=569}}). * {{ill|Ōan|en|Ōan|WD=Q1146245|lt=Ōan era}} 1st year/{{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|WD=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei}} 23rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1368|en|1368|WD=Q6207|lt=1368}} {{ill|March 29|en|March 29|WD=Q2459|lt=March 29}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Murakami|en|Emperor Go-Murakami|WD=Q440447|lt=Go-Murakami Tennō}}, the 97th emperor (born {{ill|1328|en|1328|WD=Q5802|lt=1328}}). * In Tenshō 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1582|en|1582|WD=Q6719|lt=1582}} {{ill|April 3|en|April 3|WD=Q2509|lt=April 3}}) – {{ill|Takeda Katsuyori|en|Takeda Katsuyori|WD=Q662482|lt=Takeda Katsuyori}}, a samurai and son of {{ill|Takeda Shingen|en|Takeda Shingen|WD=Q276404|lt=Takeda Shingen}} (born {{ill|1546|en|1546|WD=Q6533|lt=1546}}).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|10|3|12|2|11|4|3|0311|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十一]][[zh:三月十一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十一]][[zh:三月十一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月十一]][[zh:三月十一]]
{{Not to be confused with|March 11|qq=March 11}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 11''' is the 11th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * (【[318]】 _月_日) – The governor of the southern Yangtze region, {{ill|Sima Mo|ja|司馬寞|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sima Mo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, ascended to the throne proclaiming himself 【元帝】, and the {{ill|Eastern Jin|ja|東晋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eastern Jin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Eastern Jin dynasty|WD=Q306928}} was established. * {{ill|Eiryaku|en|Eiryaku|WD=Q1193895|lt=Eireki}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1160|en|1160|WD=Q19662|lt=1160}} {{ill|April 19|en|April 19|WD=Q2523|lt=April 19}}) – Following defeat in the {{ill|Heiji rebellion|en|Heiji rebellion|WD=Q944859|lt=Heiji Rebellion}}, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|WD=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} was exiled to {{ill|Izu (disambiguation)|ja|伊豆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izu Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q16766555|lt=Izu|1=Izu (disambiguation)}}. * ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1192|en|1192|WD=Q19739|lt=1192}} {{ill|April 24|en|April 24|WD=Q2529|lt=April 24}}) – In the outskirts of the Southern Song capital, the {{ill|Marco Polo Bridge|en|Marco Polo Bridge|WD=Q1060121|lt=Lugou Bridge}} (also known as Marco Polo Bridge) was constructed. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1582|en|1582|WD=Q6719|lt=1582}} {{ill|April 3|en|April 3|WD=Q2509|lt=April 3}}) – After the combined forces of [[Oda Nobunaga]] and {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|家康|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川家康|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q171977}} defeated him, {{ill|Takeda Katsuyori|en|Takeda Katsuyori|WD=Q662482|lt=Takeda Katsuyori}} committed suicide, leading to the downfall of the {{ill|Takeda clan|en|Takeda clan|WD=Q1210114|lt=Takeda clan}}. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1608|en|1608|WD=Q6758|lt=1608}} {{ill|April 25|en|April 25|WD=Q2531|lt=April 25}}) – Having resigned as Commander-in-Chief, {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|WD=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} relocated to {{ill|Sunpu Castle|en|Sunpu Castle|WD=Q1038629|lt=Sunpu Castle}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|WD=Q1195131|lt=Kansei}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1800|en|1800|WD=Q6875|lt=1800}} {{ill|April 4|en|April 4|WD=Q2508|lt=April 4}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Nariaki|en|Tokugawa Nariaki|WD=Q1323770|lt=Tokugawa Saira}}, the 9th head of the {{ill|Mito Domain|en|Mito Domain|WD=Q1146904|lt=Mito Domain}} and father of {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|en|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|WD=Q287657|lt=Tokugawa Yoshinobu}} (died {{ill|1860|en|1860|WD=Q7691|lt=1860}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1834|en|1834|WD=Q7591|lt=1834}} {{ill|April 19|en|April 19|WD=Q2523|lt=April 19}}) – {{ill|Hashimoto Sanai|en|Hashimoto Sanai|WD=Q1036286|lt=Hashimoto Sanao}}, a samurai of the {{ill|Fukui Domain|en|Fukui Domain|WD=Q903537|lt=Fukui Domain}} (died {{ill|1859|en|1859|WD=Q7687|lt=1859}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|WD=Q200188|lt=Shinmu Tennō}} 76th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|585 BC|en|585 BC|WD=Q1059158|lt=585 BC}} {{ill|April 9|en|April 9|WD=Q2504|lt=April 9}}) – {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|WD=Q200188|lt=Shinmu Tennō}}, the first {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan}} (born {{ill|585 BC|en|585 BC|WD=Q1059158|lt=585 BC}} or another traditional date). * ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|618|en|618|WD=Q31035|lt=618}} {{ill|April 11|en|April 11|WD=Q2501|lt=April 11}}) – {{ill|Emperor Yang of Sui|en|Emperor Yang of Sui|WD=Q7419|lt=Yang Emperor}}, the 2nd emperor of the {{ill|Sui dynasty|en|Sui dynasty|WD=Q7405|lt=Sui Dynasty}} (born {{ill|569|en|569|WD=Q33409|lt=569}}). * {{ill|Ōan|en|Ōan|WD=Q1146245|lt=Ōan era}} 1st year/{{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|WD=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei}} 23rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1368|en|1368|WD=Q6207|lt=1368}} {{ill|March 29|en|March 29|WD=Q2459|lt=March 29}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Murakami|en|Emperor Go-Murakami|WD=Q440447|lt=Go-Murakami Tennō}}, the 97th emperor (born {{ill|1328|en|1328|WD=Q5802|lt=1328}}). * In Tenshō 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1582|en|1582|WD=Q6719|lt=1582}} {{ill|April 3|en|April 3|WD=Q2509|lt=April 3}}) – {{ill|Takeda Katsuyori|en|Takeda Katsuyori|WD=Q662482|lt=Takeda Katsuyori}}, a samurai and son of {{ill|Takeda Shingen|en|Takeda Shingen|WD=Q276404|lt=Takeda Shingen}} (born {{ill|1546|en|1546|WD=Q6533|lt=1546}}).
== Commemorations ==

{{ill|1582|en|1582|qid=Q6719|lt=1582|1=1582}} {{ill|April 3|en|April 3|qid=Q2509|lt=April 3|1=April 3}}) – After the combined forces of [[Oda Nobunaga]] and {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|家康|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川家康|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q171977}} defeated him, {{ill|Takeda Katsuyori|en|Takeda Katsuyori|qid=Q662482|lt=Takeda Katsuyori|1=Takeda Katsuyori}} committed suicide, leading to the downfall of the {{ill|Takeda clan|en|Takeda clan|qid=Q1210114|lt=Takeda clan|1=Takeda clan}}. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 13rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1608|en|1608|qid=Q6758|lt=1608|1=1608}} {{ill|April 25|en|April 25|qid=Q2531|lt=April 25|1=April 25}}) – Having resigned as Commander-in-Chief, {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} relocated to {{ill|Sunpu Castle|en|Sunpu Castle|qid=Q1038629|lt=Sunpu Castle|1=Sunpu Castle}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|qid=Q1195131|lt=Kansei|1=Kansei}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1800|en|1800|qid=Q6875|lt=1800|1=1800}} {{ill|April 4|en|April 4|qid=Q2508|lt=April 4|1=April 4}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Nariaki|en|Tokugawa Nariaki|qid=Q1323770|lt=Tokugawa Saira|1=Tokugawa Nariaki}}, the 9th head of the {{ill|Mito Domain|en|Mito Domain|qid=Q1146904|lt=Mito Domain|1=Mito Domain}} and father of {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|en|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|qid=Q287657|lt=Tokugawa Yoshinobu|1=Tokugawa Yoshinobu}} (died {{ill|1860|en|1860|qid=Q7691|lt=1860|1=1860}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1834|en|1834|qid=Q7591|lt=1834|1=1834}} {{ill|April 19|en|April 19|qid=Q2523|lt=April 19|1=April 19}}) – {{ill|Hashimoto Sanai|en|Hashimoto Sanai|qid=Q1036286|lt=Hashimoto Sanao|1=Hashimoto Sanai}}, a samurai of the {{ill|Fukui Domain|en|Fukui Domain|qid=Q903537|lt=Fukui Domain|1=Fukui Domain}} (died {{ill|1859|en|1859|qid=Q7687|lt=1859|1=1859}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|qid=Q200188|lt=Shinmu Tennō|1=Emperor Jimmu}} 76th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|585 BC|en|585 BC|qid=Q1059158|lt=585 BC|1=585 BC}} {{ill|April 9|en|April 9|qid=Q2504|lt=April 9|1=April 9}}) – {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|qid=Q200188|lt=Shinmu Tennō|1=Emperor Jimmu}}, the first {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (born {{ill|585 BC|en|585 BC|qid=Q1059158|lt=585 BC|1=585 BC}} or another traditional date). * ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|618|en|618|qid=Q31035|lt=618|1=618}} {{ill|April 11|en|April 11|qid=Q2501|lt=April 11|1=April 11}}) – {{ill|Emperor Yang of Sui|en|Emperor Yang of Sui|qid=Q7419|lt=Yang Emperor|1=Emperor Yang of Sui}}, the 2nd emperor of the {{ill|Sui dynasty|en|Sui dynasty|qid=Q7405|lt=Sui Dynasty|1=Sui dynasty}} (born {{ill|569|en|569|qid=Q33409|lt=569|1=569}}). * {{ill|Ōan|en|Ōan|qid=Q1146245|lt=Ōan era|1=Ōan}} 1st year/{{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|qid=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei|1=Zhengping}} 23rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1368|en|1368|qid=Q6207|lt=1368|1=1368}} {{ill|March 29|en|March 29|qid=Q2459|lt=March 29|1=March 29}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Murakami|en|Emperor Go-Murakami|qid=Q440447|lt=Go-Murakami Tennō|1=Emperor Go-Murakami}}, the 97th emperor (born {{ill|1328|en|1328|qid=Q5802|lt=1328|1=1328}}). * In Tenshō 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1582|en|1582|qid=Q6719|lt=1582|1=1582}} {{ill|April 3|en|April 3|qid=Q2509|lt=April 3|1=April
